title: Thaumcraft 4 Enhanced for PojavLauncher
description: A light collection of mods specifically intended for compatibility with PojavLauncher for Android Devices
body:
This is a simple and lightweight modpack specifically intended for use with the PovajLauncher application allowing Android users to play Java Edition & Modded Minecraft on their smartphones.

Modlist is based on the [Thaumcraft Enhanced](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumcraft-enhanced) modpack.

Alongside these mods the pack also features some newer add-ons such as Thaumic Bases (as well as well-known older add-ons such as Thaumic Horizons & Thaumic Upholstry (check mod. Pack includes both Aether Legacy and Botania mods alongside the core gameplay of Thaumcraft and it's extenstive add-ons.

This mod also makes use of Rozmir's scripts found here in [Thaumcraft Aspects Re-Tweaked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/thaumcraft-aspects-re-tweaked) for cross-mod compatibility.

Version 1.0.1 also makes use of [Zyin055's Symbiotic Botania and Thaumcraft customizations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/symbiotic-botania-and-thaumcraft) as well as [Nostalgic World Gen by karnimani_guy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/teds-old-world-gen-mod)

This version is NOT YET RELEASED, as I need to fix the script errors, so sorry about any inconveniences.

_Botania tiers:
	tier 1 flowers
	runic alter
	alchemy catalyst
	tier 2 flowers
	elven
	conjuration catalyst
	gaia

Thaumcraft tiers:
	arcane worktable
	alchemy
	infusion
	golems
	eldritch

Tier 1: thaumcraft - arcane worktable
		botania - runic alter, alchemy catalyst, tier 1 flowers
Tier 2: thaumcraft - alchemy
Tier 3: thaumcraft - infusion
		botania - tier 2 flowers
Tier 4: botania - elven
Tier 5: thaumcraft - golems, eldritch
		botania - gaia
_

Enjoy :)

Another recommended mod that I am unable to include in the pack is [Inventory Crafting Grid](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-crafting-grid) to simplify crafting for mobile players,

NOTE: This modpack does not include performance mods on its own but it is recommended to download Optifine and add it to Povajlauncher or desktop

Installation Instruction for Android users:

Install "[PovajLauncher](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=net.kdt.pojavlaunch&hl=en_CA)" from Play Store, add Microsoft Account.

Click on arrow above "Play" -> Create New Profile

Select "Create Forge Profile" -> 1.7.10-10.13.4.1614 , wait for setup to finish.

Download or Install Content of the Modpack to PC

Connect your phone via USB cable to start File Transfer

Navigate to Your PC\Your Phone\Internal shared storage\Android\data\net.kdt.pojavlaunch\files\.minecraft

Drag & drop config, mods, scripts (required)

Obtain Optifine_MOD .jar from [Optifine.net](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.7.10_HD_U_E7.jar&x=ef16) & add to "mods" folder (Optional but recommended)

Obtain Faithful 32x modded textures embedded from [F32Organization](https://github.com/F32Organization/Faithful32-1.7.10) and add to resourceparks (Optional)

Disconnect the cable, Launch and wait for client to start Minecraft 1.7.10, it will ask you to setup your controller buttons if you are using one (images in gallery of the modpack setup with a Moto G04)
